◆ Level-80 gearing path

Fresh level 80

  • Reach 535 Defense for heroic bosses.
  • Build toward 540 before raid bosses.
  • Use dungeons, emblems, reputation, and affordable crafted pieces.
  • Replace weak slots before chasing perfect hit or expertise.

Raid-ready base set

  • Keep 540 Defense without fragile temporary buffs.
  • Favor stamina and armor until burst damage feels stable.
  • Add hit or expertise when misses are causing real problems.
  • Carry at least one alternate trinket for physical or magic damage.

Encounter-tuned sets

  • Keep one dependable general set.
  • Save useful armor, stamina, hit, expertise, resistance, and block pieces.
  • Swap only for a known encounter job.
  • Recheck Defense, glyphs, and taunt reliability after every swap.
Why there is no single perfect tank set
  • Armor / effective health: heavy physical damage and progression.
  • Stamina / magic support: large magic bursts or mixed damage.
  • Hit / taunt reliability: required pickups, taunts, stuns, or interrupts.
  • Expertise: threat reliability; pursue the parry cap only when parry-haste is confirmed and important.
  • Block / add set: many smaller hits where Holy Shield and block value can do meaningful work.
